# zenbench public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zenbench.txt 534 lines (supported surface) | zenbench.features.txt 94 added (features: alloc-profiling,async,charts,cli,cpu-time,criterion-compat,daemon,precise-timing,wasm) | zenbench.internal.txt 10 lines (10 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                 9
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        41
#   pub consts/statics                          2
#   pub macros                                  1
#   free functions                             37
#   inherent methods                          163
#   struct fields                             243
#   enum variants                              16
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)        90
#   auto-trait-complete types                  25
#   auto-trait exceptions                       5
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                          290
#   baseline                         23
#   calibration                       5
#   daemon                           30
#   exclusive                        32
#   mcp                               1
#   platform                         20
#   prelude                          81
#   quickchart                       30

## items (500 lines)

pub mod zenbench
pub mod baseline
pub struct baseline::BaselineComparison
pub baseline::BaselineComparison::benchmarks: alloc::vec::Vec<baseline::BenchmarkDelta>
pub baseline::BaselineComparison::improvements: usize
pub baseline::BaselineComparison::missing_benchmarks: alloc::vec::Vec<alloc::string::String>
pub baseline::BaselineComparison::new_benchmarks: alloc::vec::Vec<alloc::string::String>
pub baseline::BaselineComparison::regressions: usize
pub baseline::BaselineComparison::unchanged: usize
pub baseline::BaselineComparison::warnings: alloc::vec::Vec<alloc::string::String>
pub struct baseline::BenchmarkDelta
pub baseline::BenchmarkDelta::baseline_mean: f64
pub baseline::BenchmarkDelta::group: alloc::string::String
pub baseline::BenchmarkDelta::improved: bool
pub baseline::BenchmarkDelta::name: alloc::string::String
pub baseline::BenchmarkDelta::new_mean: f64
pub baseline::BenchmarkDelta::pct_change: f64
pub baseline::BenchmarkDelta::regressed: bool
pub fn baseline::compare_against_baseline(&SuiteResult, &SuiteResult, f64) -> baseline::BaselineComparison
pub fn baseline::delete_baseline(&str) -> std::io::error::Result<()>

pub fn baseline::load_baseline(&str) -> core::result::Result<SuiteResult, alloc::string::String>
pub fn baseline::print_comparison_report(&baseline::BaselineComparison)
pub fn baseline::prune_baselines(u64) -> std::io::error::Result<usize>
pub fn baseline::save_baseline(&SuiteResult, &str) -> std::io::error::Result<std::path::PathBuf>

## trait impls (28 types)

## auto traits

25 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
AllocProfiler<A>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Unpin !UnwindSafe
BenchGroup: !RefUnwindSafe !Sync !UnwindSafe
Suite: !RefUnwindSafe !Sync !UnwindSafe
exclusive::Lock: !RefUnwindSafe !UnwindSafe
platform::SystemMonitor: !Freeze
